message:
🐛 Fix missing loading/error states and inconsistent spacing (#4627)

Add error states with retry buttons to pod drilldown components
(PodAiAnalysis, PodRelatedTab, PodOutputTab). Add loading spinners
to GrantAccessModal and CreateNamespaceModal submit buttons. Add
loading state to AgentStatusIndicator agent discovery.

Replace inline magic-number spacing with CSS custom properties in
FlightPlanBlueprint export template, named constants in ParetoFrontier
ECharts tooltips, and named constants in auth.tsx session banner.

Fixes #4623, #4625

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
